session_changes.summary: Blog readability overhaul, FAQ accordion component, 4:3 image standardization, pSEO blog content improvements
changes: Blog post typography: body text upgraded from 14px to 17-18px with 1.85 line-height, white text, generous spacing
Blog content column narrowed from max-w-3xl (768px) to max-w-[720px] for focused reading
Blog hyperlinks: white with subtle underline, accent red on hover
Blog bullet/number markers: white (previously gold, originally accent red)
Blog blockquotes: gold left border, larger italic text (19-20px)
New reusable FAQAccordion component: src/components/ui/FAQAccordion.tsx — divider-based accordion with plus/minus icon, used on all service pages
Blog FAQ sections use <details>/<summary> HTML styled via globals.css to match FAQAccordion look
All blog image containers standardized to aspect-[4/3] (homepage BlogPreview, blog hub cards, blog post hero)
Programmatic SEO blog: added hero image (/blog/programatic-seo.jpeg), rewrote topical ecosystem architecture section with Wise case study
Programmatic SEO blog: FAQ section converted from plain markdown to collapsible <details>/<summary> accordion

blog_typography.h2: text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-3xl, font-bold, mt-14 mb-5, tracking-tight

blog_images.aspect_ratio: 4:3 (aspect-[4/3]) everywhere — homepage preview, blog hub cards, blog post hero
blog_images.format: All future blog images should be 4:3

faq_component.style: Divider-based (border-top/bottom lines, not boxed cards), large question text (text-lg sm:text-xl), circled plus/minus icon, smooth grid-row expand animation

reusable_components.name: FAQAccordion
reusable_components.description: Divider-based FAQ accordion with plus/minus icon animation. Accepts items array of {question, answer}, optional heading/eyebrow props.
